ipinfo-infobox-temporary-account-help: Cinwaanno IP badan ayaa la xiriira akoonkan ku-meelgaarka ah. Waxaad hadda arkaysaa macluumaadka IP-ga ee cinwaanka IP-ga ugu dambeeyay ee la isticmaalay. [[Special:IPInfo/$1|Eeg macluumaadka IP-ga dhammaan cinwaannada IP-ga]].
ipinfo-special-ipinfo-legend: Ka raadi macluumaadka IP ee dhammaan cinwaanada IP ee uu isticmaalay isticmaale ku-meelgaar ah, ama cinwaan IP oo aan la xadidin. Ugu badnaan $1 {{PLURAL:$1|natiijo|natiijooyin}} ayaa la soo bandhigayaa.
ipinfo-special-ipinfo-target: Magaca isticmaalaha ama cinwaanka IP-ga ee la beegsanayo:
ipinfo-special-ipinfo-no-results: Wax macluumaad IP ah looma heli karo $1.
ipinfo-special-ipinfo-ip-legend: Ka raadi macluumaadka IP ee cinwaan IP ah.
ipinfo-special-ipinfo-no-right-ip: Ma haysatid oggolaansho aad ku eegto macluumaadka IP ee cinwaanada IP ee kala duwan.
right-ipinfo-view-arbitrary-ip: Ka raadi macluumaadka IP ee cinwaanada IP ee kala duwan bogga Special:IPInfo
action-ipinfo-view-arbitrary-ip: Raadi macluumaadka IP ee cinwaanada IP ee kala duwan
